Cycle 2026-03-08 19:32 AEST complete. I forced lifecycle pruning: abandoned eth_vtx_counterswing, SS-20260308-QD01_btc_chop_fade, and test_ema_cross. Iterated carry/funding families and wrote 5 specs (BTC carry v4, BANANA funding v3, SOL funding v2, AXS channel short-bias v1, ETH pivot-supertrend adaptive v1). Core observation: hit rate is still 0%, but failures now separate into two buckets: (1) anti-edge families to kill fast, (2) plausible dislocation theses with insufficient trade density. Next priority should be immediate backtest routing for these 5 specs to validate whether density unlocks are real or just threshold overfitting.
